payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Close-up of the bed corner showing a light striped fabric duvet or comforter in white, pale gray and blue tones with visible stitched seams and small wrinkles; the mattress/bedding edge is partially cropped at the image border and the foreground bed is approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
